title: REPLACE_WITH_TITLE
problem_pddl:
(define (problem REPLACE_PROBLEM_NAME)
  (:domain enacttom)
  (:objects
    agent_0 agent_1 - agent
    REPLACE_ROOM - room
    REPLACE_OBJECT_A REPLACE_OBJECT_B - object
    REPLACE_CONTAINER REPLACE_FURNITURE - furniture
  )
  (:init
    (agent_in_room agent_0 REPLACE_ROOM)
    (agent_in_room agent_1 REPLACE_ROOM)
    (is_in_room REPLACE_OBJECT_A REPLACE_ROOM)
    (is_in_room REPLACE_OBJECT_B REPLACE_ROOM)
    (is_in_room REPLACE_CONTAINER REPLACE_ROOM)
    (is_in_room REPLACE_FURNITURE REPLACE_ROOM)
  )
  (:goal (and
    (K agent_0 (is_open REPLACE_CONTAINER))
    (is_open REPLACE_FURNITURE)
    (is_on_top REPLACE_OBJECT_A REPLACE_FURNITURE)
  ))
)
